prompt: Draft a rent increase letter for a tenant at 123 Oak Street. Current rent is $1,800/month, increasing to $1,900/month effective April 1, 2026. The tenant's name is Sarah Chen and the lease renewal deadline is March 15.
expectations: Letter includes tenant name (Sarah Chen) and property address (123 Oak Street)
Current rent ($1,800) and new rent ($1,900) are both stated
Tone is professional but not cold - follows the real estate template pattern
